name: yes_answer_requires_details
description: When a checkbox question is answered 'Yes' (indicating an adverse finding), the DETAILS column should contain a handwritten explanation. Flag if 'Yes' but no handwritten note.

name: expected_question_12_completeness
description: Section 12 should contain sub-questions 12(a) through 12(i) — all nine must be extracted. Missing questions may indicate a checkbox detection failure.

name: unmarked_checkbox_threshold
description: If more than 50% of checkbox questions are 'Unmarked', the form may have been poorly scanned or the checkbox detection is failing. Flag for review.

name: low_confidence_checkbox_review
description: Flag any checkbox question where extraction confidence is below 0.7 for human review

name: measurements_present
description: At minimum, height and weight measurements should be present on a medical exam form

name: valid_answer_values
description: Every checkbox answer must be exactly 'Yes', 'No', or 'Unmarked'. Any other value is invalid.
